register_user: INSERT INTO user(name, email, password, ip, agent, date_time, role) VALUES (:name, :email, :password, :ip, :agent, :date_time, :role)
get_user: SELECT name, password, role FROM user WHERE email = :email
select_quality: SELECT quality FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 AND quality IS NOT NULL AND quality != "" GROUP BY quality ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
select_extension: SELECT DISTINCT extension FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY extension
select_resolution: SELECT resolution FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY resolution ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20
select_fps: SELECT fps FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 AND fps IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fps ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 20
advanced: SELECT id_movie, title, year, duration_str, ratings, urlpicture, M.id_genre AS idgen, genre.name AS genre_name FROM movies AS M INNER JOIN genre ON genre.id_genre = idgen WHERE M.deleted = 0 AND (id_movie = :id_movie OR quality = :quality OR extension = :extension OR resolution = :resolution OR fps = :fps OR id_country = :id_country OR (ratings > :min_rating AND ratings < :max_rating) OR (file_created > :min_date AND file_created < :max_date)) LIMIT 50
get_info_genre: SELECT id_genre, name, num_movies, local_size_str, local_duration_str, is_subgenre FROM genre ORDER BY is_subgenre ASC, name ASC
get_all_countries: SELECT id_country, name, code, flag FROM country ORDER BY name ASC
get_all_genres: SELECT id_genre, name, is_subgenre FROM genre WHERE is_subgenre = 0 ORDER BY name ASC
get_all_subgenres: SELECT id_genre, name, is_subgenre FROM genre WHERE is_subgenre = 1 ORDER BY name ASC
delete_movie: UPDATE movies SET deleted = 1 WHERE id_movie = :id_movie AND deleted = 0
report_bd_01: SELECT report_date, num_movies, global_size, global_duration, real_size, add_recent FROM report WHERE hdd_code = :hdd_code ORDER BY report_date
report_bd_02: SELECT name, num_movies FROM genre WHERE is_subgenre = 0 ORDER BY name
report_bd_03: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_movies, year FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
report_bd_04: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_movies, C.name AS country FROM movies AS M, country AS C WHERE M.deleted = 0 AND M.id_country = C.id_country GROUP BY M.id_country ORDER BY num_movies ASC
report_bd_05: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_movies, ratings FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 AND hdd_code = :hdd_code GROUP BY ratings ORDER BY ratings
report_bd_06: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_movies, extension FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY extension ORDER BY num_movies DESC
world_map: SELECT UPPER(C.code) AS code, UPPER(C.name) AS country, COUNT(*) AS num_movies FROM movies AS M, country AS C WHERE M.deleted = 0 AND M.id_country = C.id_country GROUP BY M.id_country ORDER BY num_movies DESC
report_bd_07: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_movies, CASE WHEN hdd_code = 0 THEN "HDD 0 (INTERNO)" ELSE "HDD 1 (EXTERNO)" END AS hdd_label FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY hdd_code
stats_summary: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_movies, SUM(size) AS total_size, SUM(duration) AS total_duration, COUNT(DISTINCT id_genre) + COUNT(DISTINCT id_subgenre) AS total_genres FROM movies WHERE deleted = 0
genres_cloud: SELECT genre.id_genre, genre.name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM movies JOIN genre ON genre.id_genre = COALESCE(movies.id_subgenre, movies.id_genre) WHERE movies.deleted = 0 AND genre.is_subgenre = 0 GROUP BY genre.id_genre, genre.name ORDER BY count DESC
